[Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 6/3 (Tue)!

🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 6/3 (Tue) 2:00 – 6/10 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
